Package jline.lang.nodes

Class Join

java.lang.Object
jline.lang.Element
jline.lang.NetworkElement
jline.lang.nodes.Node
jline.lang.nodes.StatefulNode
jline.lang.nodes.Station
jline.lang.nodes.Join
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Join extends Station implements Serializable
A node that reassembles a set of sibling tasks into the original parent job
